SELECT L.name FROM "League" AS L JOIN "Match" AS M ON L.id = M.league_id WHERE M.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY L.id, L.name ORDER BY SUM(COALESCE(M.home_team_goal,0) + COALESCE(M.away_team_goal,0)) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.team_long_name FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010' AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal GROUP BY T3.team_long_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT T2.name FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T1.home_team_goal = T1.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday)) AS REAL) AS age FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
SELECT T1.name, COUNT(T2.league_id) FROM League AS T1 JOIN "Match" AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.league_id) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT team_fifa_api_id FROM "Team_Attributes" WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed > 50 AND buildUpPlaySpeed < 60

SELECT DISTINCT T.team_long_name FROM "Team_Attributes" AS TA JOIN "Team" AS T ON T.team_api_id = TA.team_api_id WHERE strftime('%Y', TA.date) = '2012' AND TA.buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL AND TA.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT CAST(SUM(buildUpPlayPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM "Team_Attributes" WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012' AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL)

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_fifa_api_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_fifa_api_id) AS REAL) AS percentage FROM Player p JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON pa.player_fifa_api_id = p.player_fifa_api_id WHERE CAST(substr(p.birthday,1,4) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992

SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.player_fifa_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T1.height > 180 GROUP BY T1.player_name ORDER BY CAST(SUM(T2.heading_accuracy) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.player_fifa_api_id) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT T1.name FROM League AS T1 JOIN "Match" AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id WHERE T2.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY T1.name HAVING SUM(T2.home_team_goal) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) > SUM(T2.away_team_goal) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id)
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE substr(birthday,1,7) = '1970-10'

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) - (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE player_name IN ('Aaron Lennon', 'Abdelaziz Barrada') ORDER BY birthday ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) AND height IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' AND attacking_work_rate = 'low'

SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.volleys > 70 AND T2.dribbling > 70

SELECT (CAST(a.overall_rating - b.overall_rating AS REAL) / b.overall_rating) * 100 FROM (SELECT pa.overall_rating FROM Player p JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' LIMIT 1) a CROSS JOIN (SELECT pa.overall_rating FROM Player p JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' LIMIT 1) b
SELECT AVG(PA.overall_rating) FROM "Player" AS P JOIN "Player_Attributes" AS PA ON P.player_api_id = PA.player_api_id WHERE P.player_name = 'Pietro Marino'
SELECT MAX(T1.chanceCreationPassing), T1.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT date FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant' ORDER BY T1.crossing DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.buildUpPlayPassingClass FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient' AND T2.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'
SELECT T2.defenceAggressionClass FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Hannover 96' AND T2.date LIKE '2015-09-10%'

SELECT AVG(T1.overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Marko Arnautovic' AND SUBSTR(T1.date, 1, 10) BETWEEN '2007-02-22' AND '2016-04-21'

SELECT CAST((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND T1.date = '2013/7/12') - (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND T1.date = '2013/7/12') AS REAL) / (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND T1.date = '2013/7/12') * 100
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
SELECT P.player_name FROM "Player" AS P JOIN "Player_Attributes" AS PA ON P.player_api_id = PA.player_api_id WHERE PA.overall_rating IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PA.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
SELECT DISTINCT T.team_short_name FROM Team AS T JOIN Team_Attributes AS TA ON T.team_api_id = TA.team_api_id WHERE TA.chanceCreationPassingClass = 'Safe'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player WHERE player_name LIKE 'Aaron%' AND birthday > '1990'
SELECT (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = 6) - (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = 23)
SELECT P.id FROM "Player" AS P JOIN "Player_Attributes" AS PA ON P.player_api_id = PA.player_api_id WHERE PA.preferred_foot = 'right' AND PA.potential IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PA.potential ASC LIMIT 4
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) FROM "Player_Attributes" WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' AND crossing = (SELECT MAX(crossing) FROM "Player_Attributes")
SELECT T1.home_team_goal, T1.away_team_goal FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN "League" AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id WHERE T2.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League' AND T1.date LIKE '2008-09-24%'
SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlaySpeedClass FROM Team_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'KSV Cercle Brugge'
SELECT T1.finishing, T1.curve FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id ORDER BY T2.weight DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.name FROM `Match` AS T1 JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.id) DESC LIMIT 4
SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN "Team" AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id ORDER BY T1.away_team_goal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.overall_rating IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.height < 180 AND T2.overall_rating > 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
SELECT T1.driverRef FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 20 ORDER BY CAST(T2.q1 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT d.surname FROM drivers AS d JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverId = q.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 19 AND q.q2 = (SELECT MIN(q2) FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 19)
SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Germany'
SELECT lat, lng FROM "circuits" AS T1 JOIN "races" AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
SELECT "circuits".lat, "circuits".lng FROM "circuits" JOIN "races" ON "circuits".circuitId = "races".circuitId WHERE "races".name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix'
SELECT T1.q1 FROM qualifying AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 354 AND T2.forename = 'Bruno' AND T2.surname = 'Senna'
SELECT number FROM qualifying WHERE q3 LIKE '1:54%' AND raceId = 903
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT driverId) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2007 AND T1.time IS NULL
SELECT T1.driverId FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 592 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.dob ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.url FROM lapTimes AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 161 AND T1.time LIKE '1:27%'
SELECT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'
SELECT T2.url FROM constructorResults AS T1 JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.raceId = 9 ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.code FROM qualifying AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 45 AND T1.q3 = '0:01:33'
SELECT T1.url FROM seasons AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.raceId = 901
SELECT T2.driverId FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 872 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.dob DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE raceId = 853 AND driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta')) - (SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE raceId = 854 AND driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta')) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE raceId = 853 AND driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta'))
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(driverId) FROM results JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16'
SELECT name FROM races WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = (SELECT strftime('%Y', MIN(date)) FROM races) AND strftime('%m', date) = (SELECT strftime('%m', MIN(date)) FROM races)
SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T2.points FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name FROM "lapTimes" AS lt JOIN "drivers" AS d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId JOIN "races" AS r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE lt.milliseconds = (SELECT MIN(milliseconds) FROM "lapTimes" WHERE milliseconds IS NOT NULL)

SELECT AVG(l.milliseconds) FROM lapTimes AS l JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races AS r ON l.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2009

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.position > 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010

SELECT name, nationality, max_points FROM (SELECT d.driverId, d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS name, d.nationality, COUNT(ds.wins) AS win_count, MAX(ds.points) AS max_points FROM drivers AS d JOIN driverStandings AS ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId GROUP BY d.driverId) ORDER BY win_count DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER)) AS age, forename || ' ' || surname AS name FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.name, c.name, c.location FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE strftime('%Y', r.date) = '2005' AND strftime('%m', r.date) = '09'
SELECT T3.name FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Alex' AND T1.surname = 'Yoong' AND T2.position < 20

SELECT r.name, r.year FROM races AS r JOIN lapTimes AS lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId JOIN drivers AS d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher' AND lt.milliseconds = (SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds) FROM lapTimes lt2 JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId WHERE d2.forename = 'Michael' AND d2.surname = 'Schumacher' AND lt2.milliseconds IS NOT NULL)

SELECT r.name, res.points FROM results AS res JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.year = (SELECT MIN(r2.year) FROM results res2 JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId JOIN races r2 ON res2.raceId = r2.raceId WHERE d2.forename = 'Lewis' AND d2.surname = 'Hamilton') LIMIT 1
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM "races" AS r JOIN "circuits" AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE r.name = 'European Grand Prix'
SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Silverstone Circuit'
SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'
SELECT nationality FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT d.driverRef FROM results AS r JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId JOIN drivers AS d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2007 AND r.position = 1

SELECT races.name FROM results JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND results.rank IS NOT NULL ORDER BY results.rank ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT MAX(CAST(results.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE races.year = 2009 AND races.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND results.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL

SELECT positionOrder FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T3.year = 2008
SELECT r.time FROM results AS r JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND r.position = 2

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverId) FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND r.time IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.driverId = r.driverId)

WITH target_race AS (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND year = 2008), champion AS (SELECT ds.driverId FROM driverStandings ds JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId WHERE r.raceId = (SELECT MAX(raceId) FROM races WHERE year = 8) ORDER BY ds.points DESC LIMIT 1), champ_time AS (SELECT r.milliseconds AS champ_ms FROM results r JOIN target_race tr ON r.raceId = tr.raceId JOIN champion c ON r.driverId = c.driverId WHERE r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL), last_time AS (SELECT MAX(r.milliseconds) AS last_ms FROM results r JOIN target_race tr ON r.raceId = tr.raceId WHERE r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL) SELECT (CAST(last_ms - champ_ms AS REAL) * 100) / last_ms FROM champ_time, last_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "circuits" WHERE location = 'Adelaide' AND country = 'Australia'
SELECT MAX(T1.points) FROM constructorStandings AS T1 JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T2.nationality = 'British'
SELECT T1.name FROM "constructors" AS T1 JOIN "constructorStandings" AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T2.raceId = 291 AND T2.points = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM constructors WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' AND constructorId IN (SELECT constructorId FROM constructorStandings WHERE points = 0 GROUP BY constructorId HAVING COUNT(raceId) = 2)

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.time IS NOT NULL THEN T1.driverId END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.driverId) * 100 FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T3.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

WITH points AS (SELECT ra.year, r.driverId, SUM(r.points) AS total_points FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId GROUP BY ra.year, r.driverId), max_points AS (SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points FROM points GROUP BY year), champions AS (SELECT p.year, p.driverId FROM points p JOIN max_points m ON p.year = m.year AND p.total_points = m.max_points) SELECT c.year, AVG(CAST(substr(r.time,1,2) AS REAL)*3600 + CAST(substr(r.time,4,2) AS REAL)*60 + CAST(substr(r.time,7) AS REAL)) AS avg_time_seconds FROM champions c JOIN results r ON r.driverId = c.driverId JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = c.year AND ra.year < 1975 AND r.time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.year ORDER BY c.year

SELECT MAX(r.fastestLap) FROM results AS r JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId JOIN (SELECT ds.driverId FROM driverStandings AS ds JOIN races AS ra2 ON ds.raceId = ra2.raceId WHERE ra2.year = 2009 GROUP BY ds.driverId ORDER BY SUM(ds.points) DESC LIMIT 1) AS champ ON champ.driverId = r.driverId WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND r.fastestLap IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results AS r JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2009

SELECT (CAST(num AS REAL) / denom) * 100 FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverId) AS num FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE ra.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 AND CAST(strftime('%Y', d.dob) AS INTEGER) < 1985 AND r.laps > 50) AS n CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverId) AS denom FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005) AS d
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId) FROM drivers AS d JOIN lapTimes AS lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'French' AND lt.milliseconds < 120000
SELECT code FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'American'

WITH top_youngest AS (SELECT driverId, code FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Dutch' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTR(dob, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) DESC, dob DESC LIMIT 3) SELECT COUNT(*) AS netherlandic_count FROM top_youngest WHERE code IS NOT NULL
SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'German' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT d.driverId, d.code FROM drivers d JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971' AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(r.milliseconds AS REAL) ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE raceId > 50 AND raceId < 100 AND statusId = 2 AND time IS NOT NULL

SELECT c.location, c.lat, c.lng, COUNT(r.raceId) AS times_held FROM circuits AS c JOIN races AS r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Austria' GROUP BY c.circuitId, c.location, c.lat, c.lng

WITH youngest AS (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1), first_qual AS (SELECT r.year, r.name, r.date, r.time FROM qualifying q JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId JOIN youngest y ON q.driverId = y.driverId WHERE r.date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.date ASC LIMIT 1) SELECT year, name, date, time FROM first_qual

WITH driver_avg AS (SELECT d.driverId, SUM(CAST(p.duration AS REAL)) / COUNT(p.duration) AS avg_duration FROM drivers d JOIN pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND d.dob IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%Y', d.dob) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985 AND p.duration IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.driverId HAVING COUNT(p.duration) > 0) SELECT d.forename, d.surname FROM drivers d JOIN driver_avg da ON d.driverId = da.driverId ORDER BY da.avg_duration ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time FROM results AS r JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId JOIN drivers AS d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2008 AND r.position = 1 AND r.time IS NOT NULL

SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T1.constructorId = T3.constructorId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T1.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.time, '.') - INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000 DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN hero_power AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.hero_id JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T3.power_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'

SELECT SUM(T1.points) AS score, T2.name, T2.nationality FROM "results" AS T1 JOIN "races" AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId JOIN "constructors" AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T3.name LIKE '%Monaco Grand Prix%' AND T3.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T1.constructorId, T2.name, T2.nationality ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM "drivers" AS T1 JOIN "qualifying" AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN "races" AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId JOIN "circuits" AS T4 ON T3.circuitId = T4.circuitId WHERE T3.year = 2008 AND T4.name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' AND T2.q3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T2.q3 AS REAL) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.forename || ' ' || T1.surname AS full_name, T1.nationality, T3.name AS first_race_name FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL) AND T3.date = (SELECT MIN(T4.date) FROM races AS T4 JOIN results AS T5 ON T4.raceId = T5.raceId WHERE T5.driverId = T1.driverId)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results AS r JOIN races AS rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId JOIN (SELECT driverId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM results AS r2 JOIN races AS rc2 ON r2.raceId = rc2.raceId WHERE rc2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r2.statusId = 3 GROUP BY driverId ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1) AS worst ON r.driverId = worst.driverId WHERE rc.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.statusId = 3

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname FROM drivers AS d JOIN (SELECT driverId, MIN(milliseconds) AS best_ms FROM lapTimes AS lt JOIN races AS r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL AND r.name LIKE '%Formula 1%' GROUP BY driverId) AS t ON d.driverId = t.driverId ORDER BY t.best_ms ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT c.name, MIN(lt.milliseconds) AS record_ms FROM circuits AS c JOIN races AS r ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId JOIN lapTimes AS lt ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE c.country = 'Italy' AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.circuitId, c.name

SELECT bond_type FROM bond WHERE bond_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(o_cnt) FROM (SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS o_cnt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type='-') m LEFT JOIN atom a ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND a.element = 'o' GROUP BY m.molecule_id) sub

SELECT CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "bond" WHERE "bond_type" = '-' AND "molecule_id" IN (SELECT "molecule_id" FROM "molecule" WHERE "label" = '+')) AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "atom" WHERE "molecule_id" IN (SELECT "molecule_id" FROM "molecule" WHERE "label" = '+'))
SELECT m.molecule_id FROM molecule AS m WHERE m.label = '+' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bond AS b WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '#')
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'c' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) FROM "atom" WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM "bond" WHERE bond_type = '=')

SELECT DISTINCT element FROM (SELECT a.element FROM connected AS c JOIN atom AS a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR004_8_9' UNION ALL SELECT a2.element FROM connected AS c JOIN atom AS a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2 WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR004_8_9')

SELECT element FROM atom AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '-' GROUP BY element ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(label = '+') AS REAL) / COUNT(molecule_id) * 100, 3) AS percent FROM molecule
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(element = 'h') AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) * 100, 4) AS percent FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR206'
SELECT DISTINCT a.element, m.label FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.molecule_id = 'TR060'

SELECT b.bond_type, c.atom_id, c.atom_id2 FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "connected" AS c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_6_9'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bond_id) FROM connected WHERE (atom_id LIKE 'TR%_19' OR atom_id2 LIKE 'TR%_19') AND bond_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN "trans" AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'East Bohemia' AND T3.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district WHERE A11 > 6000 AND A11 < 10000
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A3 = 'North Bohemia' AND T2.A11 > 8000

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
), 
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
), 
district_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT district_id, A11
    FROM district
    WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM oldest_female)
), 
min_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_salary
    FROM district_avg_salary
), 
max_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_salary
    FROM district
), 
accounts_in_oldest_district AS (
    SELECT a.account_id
    FROM account a
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN female_clients fc ON d.client_id = fc.client_id
    WHERE fc.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM oldest_female)
)
SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    (SELECT max_salary FROM max_avg_salary) - (SELECT min_salary FROM min_avg_salary) AS salary_gap
FROM account a
WHERE a.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM accounts_in_oldest_district)

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN disp AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN client AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client) AND c.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district))

SELECT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN loan AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE l.status = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND l.amount = (SELECT MIN(l2.amount) FROM loan l2 JOIN account a2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id WHERE l2.status = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l2.date) = '1997' AND a2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE')

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN loan AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE l.duration > 12 AND l.amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM loan WHERE duration > 12) AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) FROM "account" AS a JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN "district" AS dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND dist.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT d.A2 FROM client AS c JOIN disp AS dsp ON c.client_id = dsp.client_id JOIN account AS a ON dsp.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = '1976/1/29'

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM client WHERE district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND A4 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A4 DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT ((CAST(b_later.balance AS REAL) - CAST(b_earlier.balance AS REAL)) / CAST(b_earlier.balance AS REAL)) * 100 AS increase_rate FROM (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM loan WHERE date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY loan_id ASC LIMIT 1) AND date = '1998-12-27' AND balance IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) AS b_later CROSS JOIN (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM loan WHERE date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY loan_id ASC LIMIT 1) AND date = '1993-03-22' AND balance IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) AS b_earlier
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status='A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM loan
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN amount END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM loan WHERE amount < 100000

SELECT district.district_id, district.A2 AS state, ((CAST(district.A13 AS REAL) - CAST(district.A12 AS REAL)) / CAST(district.A12 AS REAL)) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percent FROM loan JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id WHERE loan.status = 'D'

SELECT d.A2, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) FROM "client" AS c JOIN "disp" AS dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id JOIN "district" AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status = 'A' AND T1.amount >= 250000 AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, t.amount FROM trans AS t JOIN account AS a ON t.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%' AND t.amount IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.amount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "loan" AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN "district" AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.status IN ('C', 'D') AND CAST(T3.A2 AS REAL) = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS c JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id JOIN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(A15 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS t ON d.district_id = t.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'M'

SELECT DISTINCT account_id FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND substr(date, 1, 4) = '1998' AND amount < (SELECT AVG(CAST(amount AS REAL)) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND substr(date, 1, 4) = '1998')
SELECT DISTINCT T1.frequency FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000 AND T1.frequency != 'OWNER'
SELECT AVG(A15) FROM "district" WHERE A15 > 4000 AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM "account" WHERE date >= '1997-01-01')
SELECT T.* FROM "trans" AS T JOIN "disp" AS D ON T.account_id = D.account_id JOIN "client" AS C ON D.client_id = C.client_id WHERE C.client_id = 3356 AND T.operation = 'VYBER'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN c.client_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) * 100 FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id WHERE di.A11 > 10000

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount END) ) * 100 AS growth_rate FROM "loan" AS l JOIN "account" AS a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) IN ('1996','1997')

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol = 'account statement') AS request_count, (SELECT k_symbol FROM trans WHERE k_symbol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k_symbol HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539) AS purpose

SELECT (CAST(male_cnt AS REAL) / total_cnt) * 100 AS percentage FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS male_cnt FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE') AS m, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS total_cnt FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE') AS t

SELECT a.account_id FROM "client" AS c JOIN "disp" AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN "account" AS a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN "district" AS di ON c.district_id = di.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(c2.birth_date) FROM "client" AS c2 WHERE c2.gender = 'F') AND di.A11 = (SELECT MIN(di2.A11) FROM "district" AS di2)
SELECT AVG(amount) FROM loan WHERE status IN ('C','D')

SELECT T4.client_id, CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T4.birth_date) AS INTEGER) AS age FROM card AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN client AS T4 ON T2.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T1.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT T1.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3 FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id JOIN trans AS T5 ON T1.account_id = T5.account_id JOIN `order` AS T6 ON T1.account_id = T6.account_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993' AND T6.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' GROUP BY T1.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T4.A3 = 'east Bohemia'
